messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in Logging. Provide technical guidance on log groups, custom logs, and audit logs.
Como criar logging no compartment production?

Para configurar Observability no OCI:

**Via CLI:**
```bash
# Criar Log Group
oci logging log-group create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "production-log-group"

# Criar alarm
oci monitoring alarm create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "high-cpu-production" \
  --is-enabled true \
  --namespace oci_computeagent \
  --metric-name CpuUtilization \
  --statistic MAX \
  --interval 5m \
  --threshold 85 \
  --pending-duration PT5M \
  --severity CRITICAL \
  --destinations '[{"serviceType": "ONS", "topicId": "<topic-ocid>"}]'
```

[MUTABLE] Custos de ingestão variam por volume.

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Logging/overview.htm
